---
title: "Learnings"
---

### Bond Markets, Analysis, and Strategies - *Frank J. Fabozzi and Francesco A. Fabozzi*  $10^{th}$ Edition:

- [Chapter 1 - Introduction](./fixed_income/Introduction.qmd)
- [Chapter 2 - Pricing of Bonds](./fixed_income/PricingofBonds.qmd)


### Accouting Learning - *[Accounting for Non-Finance Professionals - Rice University - Coursera](https://www.coursera.org/learn/pre-mba-quant-skills-accounting/)* :
